---
title: "analyse_accessibility"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(lubridate)
```


```{r}
# input directory
base_dir <- "../public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.4/2026-03-06/calib-acc-b/"

acc_dir <- paste0(base_dir,"analysis/accessibility/")
figure_dir <-  paste0(base_dir, "figures-R/")
dir.create(figure_dir)
```


```{r}
main_time <- "8:00"

accessibility_full <- data.frame()
poi_full <- data.frame()
pois <- c("hospital", "middle", "public_bath", "shinkansen","supermarket")

for(poi in pois){
  
  accessibility_full <- rbind(accessibility_full, read_csv(paste0(acc_dir, poi, "/accessibilities_simwrapper.csv")) %>% mutate (poi = poi))
  poi_full  <- rbind(poi_full,st_read(paste0(acc_dir,poi,"/pois.shp")))
  
}


accessibility_full <-  accessibility_full %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x","y"), crs = "EPSG:25832") %>% 
  mutate(time = hms(time))
  
# bbox = bb(accessibility_full, ext = 1.05)
```

Assumption: No one above 75 can drive
```{r}

accessibility_full %>%
  filter(poi == "hospital") %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  filter(population > 0) %>% mutate(population0to74 = population - `population75+`) %>% 
  select(population0to74,`population75+`,car_accessibility,teleportedWalk_accessibility) %>% 
  mutate(
    adult = pmax(teleportedWalk_accessibility,car_accessibility),
    elderly = teleportedWalk_accessibility
    ) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = c(adult, elderly), names_to = "group", values_to = "maxAccessibility") %>%
  mutate(population = case_when(group == "adult" ~ population0to74, .default = `population75+`)) %>% 
  select(group, population, maxAccessibility) %>% view()
  group_by(group) %>% 
  summarise(maxAccessibility = sum(maxAccessibility*population)/sum(population))





```


# Person-Based

```{r}

# middle
# accessibility <- read_csv("/Users/jakob/git/public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-17-base-accessibility/analysis/accessibility/middle/accessibilities.csv")

pois <- st_read("/Users/jakob/git/shared-svn/projects/matsim-gunma/data/processed/01_shapefiles/osm_buffer5km/poi_2450.shp")

accessibility <- read_csv("/Users/jakob/git/public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-17b-base-accessibility-supermarket/analysis/accessibility/supermarket/accessibilities.csv")


persons <- read_delim("../public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-17-base-accessibility/gunma.output_persons.csv.gz")

tmap_mode("view")

persons_processed <- persons %>%
  filter(!str_starts(person,"commuter")) %>% 
  full_join(accessibility,by = c("person" = "id")) %>% st_as_sf(coords = c("home_x","home_y"),crs=2450) %>% 
  mutate(age_round = floor(age/10)*10) %>% 
  mutate(age_factor = factor(age_round, levels = seq(0,100,10), labels = c(paste0(seq(0,80,10),"-",seq(10,90,10)),"90+","90+"))) %>% 
  mutate(base_max_accessibility = case_when(
    carAvail == "never" ~ teleportedWalk_accessibility, 
    .default = pmax(teleportedWalk_accessibility,car_accessibility))) %>% 
  mutate(policy_max_accessibility = case_when(
    carAvail == "never" | age >=75 ~ teleportedWalk_accessibility, 
    .default = pmax(teleportedWalk_accessibility,car_accessibility))) %>% 
    select(person,age_factor, sex, carAvail, executed_score,carAvail, ends_with("accessibility"))



persons_processed_summarised <- persons_processed %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(age_factor,sex) %>% 
  summarise(base_max_accessibility = mean(base_max_accessibility), policy_max_accessibility = mean(policy_max_accessibility)) %>% 
  mutate(diff_max_accessibility = policy_max_accessibility - base_max_accessibility)

ggplot(persons_processed_summarised) + geom_col(aes(age_factor,base_max_accessibility, fill = sex), position = "dodge")
ggplot(persons_processed_summarised) + geom_col(aes(age_factor,policy_max_accessibility, fill = sex), position = "dodge")
ggplot(persons_processed_summarised) + geom_col(aes(age_factor,diff_max_accessibility, fill = sex), position = "dodge")

tm_shape(persons_processed) + tm_dots(fill = "base_max_accessibility", fill.scale = tm_scale_continuous(values = "viridis")) +
  tm_shape(pois %>% filter(type == "supermarket")) + tm_dots(fill = "black")


```
